items.title: Zelensky to press Nato for air defence systems after intense Russian strikes
items.dek: The Ukrainian president will use the Nato meeting in Turkey to argue he needs more interceptor missiles.
items.body: The Ukrainian president will use the Nato meeting in Turkey to argue he needs more interceptor missiles.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Fatal Typhoon Maysak floods burst dam wall in China
items.dek: At least two have been killed by flooding due to Maysak, while another 480,000 have been evacuated across the southern Guangxi province.
items.body: At least two have been killed by flooding due to Maysak, while another 480,000 have been evacuated across the southern Guangxi province.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Why some African nations are turning down Trump aid money
items.dek: The Trump administration sees the aid as more transactional - but some say it is not a fair trade.
items.body: The Trump administration sees the aid as more transactional - but some say it is not a fair trade.
items.author: IriLine Desk
